subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Hearken unto My Call, for by My Call are spirits and minds quickened. Say: O people, verily this is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی اسمع ندائی و ان بندائی تحیی الارواح و العقول قل یا قوم ان هذا لهو
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
